steps.title: Define variables and set up the system
steps.content:
Let $a$ = number of adults and $c$ = number of children.

From the problem constraints:
  • Total people in the group: $a + c = 24$
  • Total revenue: $70a + 50c = 1400$
From the first equation: $a = 24 - c$

steps.title: Use substitution to solve for c
steps.content:
Substitute $a = 24 - c$ into the revenue equation:
$$70(24 - c) + 50c = 1400$$
Expand and simplify:
$$1680 - 70c + 50c = 1400$$
$$1680 - 20c = 1400$$
$$-20c = -280$$
$$c = 14$$
The group has 14 children. That is the correct answer.
